forgotPassword.asideDescription: Receive a secure link to set a new password and return to administration.
forgotPassword.asideFootnote: The form never publicly confirms whether an account exists for the address.
forgotPassword.description: Request a reset link for your administrator account.

forgotPasswordSent.asideFootnote: Sign in remains limited to accounts with the administrator role.

resetPassword.asideDescription: Choose a new password before returning to your admin workspace.
resetPassword.asideFootnote: Changing the password does not change the account's access rights.
resetPassword.description: Create a new password for your admin account.

signIn.asideDescription: Sign in with an authorized account to manage users, roles, and key metrics.
signIn.asideFootnote: Accounts without the administrator role are redirected to the restricted access screen.
signIn.title: Sign in

locked.description: You are signed in, but this account does not have the administrator rights required to open this workspace.
locked.title: You do not have access to this application.

delete.message: Do you want to delete the role "{{name}}"?
delete.title: Delete role

roles.description: Manage the roles available to users.
roles.title: Roles

delete.message: Do you want to delete the user "{{name}}"?
delete.title: Delete user

users.description: Manage accounts, roles, and CSV imports.
users.title: Users

forgotPassword.asideDescription: Receive a secure link to regain access to your account and continue your work.
forgotPassword.asideFootnote: The flow stays clear, direct, and consistent with the rest of the authentication experience.
forgotPassword.description: Fill out the form to reset your password.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot password

forgotPasswordSent.asideDescription: Open the link sent to your email address before it expires to set a new password.
forgotPasswordSent.asideFootnote: This step confirms delivery without exposing whether an account exists for the address.
forgotPasswordSent.description: If this email address is associated with an account, a reset link has been sent. The link expires in 15 minutes.
forgotPasswordSent.title: Link sent

resetPassword.asideDescription: Choose a new password and finish recovery in a familiar interface.
resetPassword.asideFootnote: Error states and primary actions stay visible without changing business logic.
resetPassword.description: Create a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidToken: The reset link is invalid or incomplete. Request a new link to continue.
resetPassword.title: Reset password

signIn.asideDescription: Sign in to a clear, modular application base that is ready to grow with your features.
signIn.asideFootnote: Keep a consistent authentication flow while you build the rest of your product.
signIn.title: Sign in

signUp.asideDescription: Start from a clean, modular base that is ready for your features without starting from scratch.
signUp.asideFootnote: Structure your application with authentication flows already aligned to your interface.
signUp.title: Sign up

cta.description: Keep this page as a clean entry point, then replace sections at your product's pace.
cta.title: Ready to build what comes next?

appFlow.description: Public pages, authentication, and dashboard follow a clear structure from the start.
appFlow.title: Consistent application flow

architecture.description: Pages compose UI sections while services and stores stay in data-access.
architecture.title: Readable architecture

features.description: The starter gives you just enough to move fast without imposing an overly specific product experience.

theming.description: Angular Material, Tailwind, and theme switching are already combined in a simple base.
theming.title: Clean, themeable interface

features.title: A deliberately simple base.

footer.description: A simple Angular base for launching a product with authentication, a dashboard, and a themeable interface.

hero.badge: Angular base ready for your next products
hero.description: A simple starter with authentication, dashboard, theming, and modern Angular foundations so you can build without starting from zero.
hero.title: Start with a clear, structured application ready to scale.

preview.readyFlowDescription: Authentication, profile, and navigation are already aligned.

messages.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can sign in.
messages.resetLinkFailed: Unable to send the reset link

account.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF. 2 MB maximum.
account.avatarSizeError: The profile photo must not exceed 2 MB.
account.avatarTypeError: Unsupported format. Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
account.description: Update the photo, name, and email address associated with your account.
account.title: Account information

profile.description: Manage your account information and password.

security.description: Choose a new password, then confirm it before saving.
security.title: Change password

profile.title: Profile settings
